title: prunella vulgaris var. intermedia
intro: Prunella vulgaris var. intermedia, also known as the self-heal or heart of the earth, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which aid in wound healing and the treatment of various infections. The health benefits of Prunella vulgaris var. intermedia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties. This herb can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, with herbal preparations often involving infusions of the leaves and flowers to harness its medicinal properties.
